The '''white-furred bantha''' was a large animal native to the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Nelvaan/Legends|Nelvaan]]. These creatures were used as riding mounts for the native [[Nelvaanian/Legends|Nelvaanian]] population and carried [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Anakin Skywalker]] and [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]] to a Nelvaanian village.
